conflict: Weather lock-in, social proximity, and desire that now has nowhere to stay abstract
consequence: The arrangement becomes a genuine three-person bond rather than two secret side affairs.
must_land_beats: A storm traps the household together long enough for ordinary conversation and domestic habits to matter.
